trade_body_targets.name: Simon Michaelides
trade_body_targets.title: Director General
trade_body_targets.org_meaning: Incorporated Society of British Advertisers (UK brand-side trade body, Clearcast customer base)
trade_body_targets.open_angle: Northell + Clearcast JV. Cost-out + risk-out framing for ISBA members. Only 8 months in role - receptive.

trade_body_targets.name: Bobi Carley
trade_body_targets.title: Director of Industry Relations & Inclusion
trade_body_targets.open_angle: Working-level door to Michaelides. Converts 'interesting' into a DG meeting.

trade_body_targets.name: Nigel Gwilliam
trade_body_targets.title: Director of Media Affairs
trade_body_targets.org_meaning: Institute of Practitioners in Advertising (UK agencies trade body)
trade_body_targets.open_angle: Agency margin recovery on creative clearance turnaround. Workflow + risk-reduction, not Clearcast extension.

trade_body_targets.name: Patrick Hann
trade_body_targets.title: Ad Tech Manager
trade_body_targets.org_meaning: Interactive Advertising Bureau UK (digital + programmatic standards, owns Gold Standard)
trade_body_targets.open_angle: 'Where does AI clearance fit in the Gold Standard / trust framework?' Position as extension, not competitor.

trade_body_targets.name: Olivia McCullagh
trade_body_targets.title: Retail Media Lead
trade_body_targets.open_angle: Retail media is fastest-growing UK channel and a clearance black box. CapClear as the layer that fixes it before regulator scrutiny lands.

trade_body_targets.name: Robin de Wouters
trade_body_targets.title: Director General

trade_body_targets.open_angle: Park for EU expansion. Useful to mark on radar today. Also EDAA Vice-Chair.

trade_body_targets.org_meaning: Industry sustainability initiative, took over GARM's sustainable media work
trade_body_targets.open_angle: Co-develop methodology for measuring carbon saved by AI clearance vs legacy. Turns CapClear into sustainability story.

company.business_model: Digital sports media + sports-betting affiliate. Revenue blend of rev-share with sportsbooks, CPA, ad sales, subscription.
company.self-description: 'Digital sports media group' - deliberate move from 'affiliate' to 'media company' branding over past 3 years
company.scale: 2,000+ websites, 30+ languages, 5 offices, 450m monthly visits across House of Brands
company.strategic_shift: Moving from lumpy one-off CPA toward recurring rev-share + subscription for earnings visibility

house_of_brands.description: World's leading esports (Counter Strike) media + community. Crown jewel for young male sports / gaming audience.
Leading US sports-betting media platform. Acquired 2021 for $240m. US beachhead.
FIFA Ultimate Team sports gaming platform.

house_of_brands.brand: Playmaker HQ, Rotogrinders, The Nation Network

house_of_brands.description: Largest social network for betting tips. 125k+ tips per month.

fanreach.what_it_is: First-party audience data product. Wraps 450m monthly visitors into a single addressable 'sports fan graph' sold to advertisers via DSPs, PMPs, programmatic guaranteed, social.
fanreach.launched: US, February 2026, with 50m+ authenticated sports fans on day one
fanreach.uk___eu_status: International rollout happening now - which is exactly why Barfield is in London
fanreach.tech_signals: AI-driven predictive segmentation + lookalike modelling. Contextual + behavioural signals. DSP-agnostic (works with The Trade Desk, DV360, Yahoo, Adform)
fanreach.sits_inside: AdVantage - Better Collective's data-driven monetisation ecosystem. The post-affiliate-revenue bet.
fanreach.betsense: Dynamic creative product. Generates many creative variants per campaign (odds, fixtures, player names). The canonical CapClear use case.

in_room_contacts.name: Will Barfield
in_room_contacts.title: Head of FanReach (Programmatic Lead)
in_room_contacts.notes: Stafford-based. Prior: Lift, Ascend, ShopWired. Product owner for international FanReach rollout. Reports to Rob Brown. Hold CapClear pitch for 10 min - let him walk through FanReach first.

in_room_contacts.name: Rob Brown
in_room_contacts.title: Director, Performance Agency & Media Planning
in_room_contacts.notes: Barfield's boss. The buying decision on any ad-tech that supports FanReach.

in_room_contacts.name: Craig Harman
in_room_contacts.title: Director of Product and Operations
in_room_contacts.notes: Platform-level product / ops. The right person to scope CapClear plug-in to FanReach delivery.

in_room_contacts.name: Matthew Tenby
in_room_contacts.title: Senior Campaign Specialist
in_room_contacts.notes: Hands-on campaign delivery. Useful for product validation conversations.

why_capclear_account.detail: Gambling is 1 of 5 named CapClear verticals. Better Collective's advertisers are FanDuel, DraftKings, BetMGM, bet365, Flutter, Entain - the brands Clearcast clears for and ASA scrutinises hardest.
BetSense produces many creative variants per campaign in regulated markets. The canonical CapClear use case - many creatives, all needing compliance check, no human-in-the-loop scale.
FanReach positions as privacy-first, authenticated 1P data. Brands want creative-side verification to match. CapClear + MM Verify pair naturally.

action_board.action: Will Barfield - introduce, ask him to walk through FanReach. Hold CapClear pitch for 10 min minimum.
Rob Brown - UK / EU commercial expansion timeline. He owns the ad-tech buying decision for FanReach.
Craig Harman - scope CapClear plug-in to FanReach delivery.
Structured follow-up with Brown + Harman together. CapClear + MM Verify against gambling vertical + dynamic creative use case.
Surface Better Collective in CapClear gambling-vertical workstream as named partnership target.

better_collective.open_angle: DO NOT PITCH CAPCLEAR COLD. Start with FanReach. Build the brand and audience relationship FIRST. The bridge: 'When FanReach scales internationally, your advertisers will be running tens of dynamic creative variants per campaign across regulated sports-betting markets. Clearcast and Northell are building the AI clearance layer for exactly that workflow. Can we set up a follow-up with your product team and walk you through CapClear?' This converts a vendor pitch into a partnership exploration.
